title: Senior Doctor - B.Braun India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - B.Braun India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
B.Braun India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!
